## Markdown: Solution {.unnumbered}

This practical builds one complete analysis document rather than many isolated short tasks. For that reason, the solution is presented as a **model report** instead of a separate answer after every question.

Use this model solution in the following way:

- first compare the overall structure of your document with the model
- then compare specific sections such as the data transformation, descriptives and analysis
- finally compare the tone and readability of the text, not just the code

::: callout-note
## What to look for

As you compare your own work to the model solution, pay attention to:

- the YAML header and overall document structure
- how code chunks and prose are interwoven
- how the analysis is explained in ordinary language
- which chunks are shown and which are hidden
:::

```{=markdown}
~~~markdown
{{< include Solution_Rmarkdown.Rmd >}}
~~~
